mapper.select: SELECT CON_ID, PRS_ID, (SELECT PRS_NAME FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = WC.PRS_ID) PRS_NAME, CON_TYPE, CON_CATEGORY, CON_TITLE, CON_SUBTITLE, CON_THUMNAIL, CON_VIDEO, CON_VIDEO_THUMNAIL, CON_ORIGIN_URL, CON_YOUTUBE_URL, CON_BODY, CON_PREFIX, CON_IMPORTANCE, CON_PRICE, CON_USE_YN, CON_WRITE_YN, CON_META_YN, date_format(CON_CREATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_CDATE, date_format(CON_UPDATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_UDATE FROM WH_CONTENT WC WHERE 1=1 AND WC.CON_ID = #{CON_ID}

SELECT CON_ID ,APP_ID ,PRS_ID ,CON_TYPE ,CON_CATEGORY ,CON_TITLE ,CON_SUBTITLE ,CON_THUMNAIL ,CON_ORIGIN_URL ,CON_YOUTUBE_URL ,CON_BODY ,CON_PREFIX ,CON_IMPORTANCE ,CON_PRICE ,CON_USE_YN ,CON_META_YN ,CON_WRITE_YN ,CON_PRIOT ,date_format(CON_CREATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_CDATE ,date_format(CON_UPDATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_UDATE FROM WH_CONTENT WHERE CON_TYPE = 5 LIMIT ${index}, 1

SELECT CON_ID ,APP_ID ,PRS_ID ,CON_TYPE ,CON_CATEGORY ,CON_TITLE ,CON_SUBTITLE ,CON_THUMNAIL ,CON_ORIGIN_URL ,CON_YOUTUBE_URL ,CON_BODY ,CON_PREFIX ,CON_IMPORTANCE ,CON_PRICE ,CON_USE_YN ,CON_META_YN ,CON_WRITE_YN ,CON_PRIOT ,date_format(CON_CREATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_CDATE ,date_format(CON_UPDATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_UDATE FROM WH_CONTENT WHERE CON_TYPE = 7 LIMIT ${index}, 1
SELECT * FROM WH_CONT_CNT WHERE CON_ID = #{CON_ID} AND MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID}
SELECT PRI_ID, CON_ID, MEM_ID, CON_PRICE, PRI_EXPD, PRI_CREATE_DATE, PRI_UPDATE_DATE FROM WH_PRICE WHERE CON_ID = #{CON_ID} AND MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') <= PRI_EXPD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_PRICE ( PRS_ID, CON_ID, MEM_ID, CON_PRICE, CON_PRICE_CHG, PRI_EXPD) VALUES ( #{PRS_ID}, #{CON_ID}, #{MEM_ID}, #{CON_PRICE}, #{CON_PRICE_CHG}, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'), interval + 29 day))
INSERT INTO WH_HEART ( PRS_ID, CON_ID, MEM_ID, CON_HEART, CON_HEART_CHG) VALUES ( (SELECT PRS_ID FROM WH_CONTENT WHERE CON_ID= #{CON_ID}), #{CON_ID}, #{MEM_ID}, #{CON_HEART}, #{CON_HEART_CHG})
mapper.select: SELECT wm.MEM_NAME, (wh.CON_HEART_CHG + wh.CON_HEART) CON_HEART_CHG FROM WH_HEART wh LEFT JOIN WH_MEMBER wm ON wm.MEM_ID = wh.MEM_ID WHERE wh.PRS_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND (wh.CON_HEART_CHG > 0 OR wh.CON_HEART > 0) ORDER BY wh.HRT_ID DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM WH_COMMENT WHERE CON_ID = #{CON_ID} AND COM_USE_YN = 1 ORDER BY COM_CREATE_DATE ASC
SELECT * FROM WH_IMAGE WHERE CON_ID = #{CON_ID} AND IMG_USE_YN = 1 ORDER BY IMG_ID ASC

SELECT CON_ID, CON_TITLE, IFNULL(CON_THUMNAIL, CON_VIDEO_THUMNAIL) as IMG_URL, CON_CREATE_DATE FROM WH_CONTENT WHERE PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID} AND CON_TYPE = #{CON_TYPE} AND CON_USE_YN = 1 ORDER BY CON_CREATE_DATE DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT C.CON_ID, C.CON_TITLE, C.CON_THUMNAIL, C.PRS_ID, DATE_FORMAT(C.CON_WRITE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS WRITE_DATE,
COALESCE(P.PRS_NAME, M.MEM_NAME) AS MEM_NAME, COALESCE(P.STORED_FILE_NM, M.MEM_PICTURE) AS MEM_PICTURE,
IFNULL(H.HEART, 0) AS HEART_COUNT
FROM WH_CONTENT C LEFT JOIN WH_PRESS P ON C.PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID LEFT JOIN WH_MEMBER M ON C.PRS_ID = M.MEM_ID LEFT JOIN WH_CONTENT_HEART H ON C.CON_ID = H.CON_ID WHERE 1=1 AND C.CON_USE_YN = 1 AND C.CON_TYPE = #{CON_TYPE} ORDER BY C.CON_ID DESC LIMIT #{START}, #{SIZE} -- 페이징 처리

SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM (
SELECT C.CON_ID, C.PRS_ID, (CASE WHEN (SELECT MEM_NAME FROM WH_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = C.PRS_ID) != '' THEN (SELECT MEM_NAME FROM WH_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = C.PRS_ID) ELSE (SELECT PRS_NAME FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = C.PRS_ID) END ) MEM_NAME, C.CON_TITLE, C.CON_SUBTITLE, IFNULL(C.CON_THUMNAIL, C.CON_VIDEO_THUMNAIL) AS CON_THUMNAIL, C.CON_YOUTUBE_URL, C.CON_BODY, C.CON_PREFIX, C.CON_IMPORTANCE, C.CON_PRICE, C.CON_META_YN, C.CON_USE_YN, C.CON_WRITE_YN, P.PRI_ID, IF(P.PRI_EXPD IS NULL, 0, IF((DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'))) < 0, 0, DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d')) + 1)) AS CON_EXPD, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_CONT_CNT WCC WHERE WCC.CON_ID = C.CON_ID) AS CON_CNT, date_format(C.CON_CREATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_CREATE_DATE, date_format(C.CON_UPDATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_UPDATE_DATE, CON_PRIOT, CON_TOP_YN, CON_TOP_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_WATCH ww WHERE ww.CON_ID = C.CON_ID) CON_WATCH_COUNT FROM WH_CONTENT C
LEFT JOIN WH_PRICE P ON C.CON_ID = P.CON_ID AND P.MEM_ID = #{PROFILE_ID} AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') <= P.PRI_EXPD WHERE C.CON_USE_YN = 1 AND (CON_TYPE = 1 OR CON_TYPE = 0 OR CON_TYPE = 9) ) M
WHERE PRS_ID = #{PROFILE_ID}

SELECT * FROM (
SELECT C.CON_ID, C.PRS_ID, (CASE WHEN (SELECT MEM_NAME FROM WH_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = C.PRS_ID) != '' THEN (SELECT MEM_NAME FROM WH_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = C.PRS_ID) ELSE (SELECT PRS_NAME FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = C.PRS_ID) END ) MEM_NAME, C.CON_TITLE, C.CON_SUBTITLE, IFNULL(C.CON_THUMNAIL, C.CON_VIDEO_THUMNAIL) AS CON_THUMNAIL, C.CON_YOUTUBE_URL, C.CON_BODY, C.CON_PREFIX, C.CON_IMPORTANCE, C.CON_PRICE, C.CON_META_YN, C.CON_USE_YN, C.CON_WRITE_YN, P.PRI_ID, IF(P.PRI_EXPD IS NULL, 0, IF((DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'))) < 0, 0, DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d')) + 1)) AS CON_EXPD, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_CONT_CNT WCC WHERE WCC.CON_ID = C.CON_ID) AS CON_CNT, date_format(C.CON_CREATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_CREATE_DATE, date_format(C.CON_UPDATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_UPDATE_DATE, CON_PRIOT, CON_TOP_YN, CON_TOP_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_WATCH ww WHERE ww.CON_ID = C.CON_ID) CON_WATCH_COUNT FROM WH_CONTENT C
LEFT JOIN WH_PRICE P ON C.CON_ID = P.CON_ID AND P.MEM_ID = #{PROFILE_ID} AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') <= P.PRI_EXPD WHERE C.CON_USE_YN = 1 AND (CON_TYPE = 1 OR CON_TYPE = 0 OR CON_TYPE = 9) ) M
WHERE PRS_ID = #{PROFILE_ID}
ORDER BY CON_TOP_DATE DESC, ${SORT_ITEM} ${SORT_ORDER} LIMIT #{SKIP}, 30

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT C.CON_ID, C.CON_TITLE, C.CON_SUBTITLE, C.CON_THUMNAIL, C.CON_YOUTUBE_URL, C.CON_BODY, C.CON_PREFIX, C.CON_IMPORTANCE, C.CON_PRICE, C.CON_USE_YN, C.CON_WRITE_YN, C.PRS_ID, C.CON_META_YN, C.CON_PRIOT, P.PRI_ID, M.MEM_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_CONT_CNT WCC WHERE WCC.CON_ID = C.CON_ID) AS CON_CNT, IF(P.PRI_EXPD IS NULL, 0, IF((DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'))) < 0, 0, DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d')) + 1)) AS CON_EXPD, date_format(C.CON_CREATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_CREATE_DATE, date_format(C.CON_UPDATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_UPDATE_DATE FROM WH_CONTENT C LEFT JOIN WH_PRICE P ON C.CON_ID = P.CON_ID AND P.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') <= P.PRI_EXPD LEFT JOIN WH_MEMBER M ON C.PRS_ID = M.MEM_ID WHERE C.CON_USE_YN = 1 AND CON_TYPE IN ('0', '1', '9') AND (CON_TITLE LIKE '%${keyword}%' OR M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%${keyword}%') union SELECT C.CON_ID, C.CON_TITLE, C.CON_SUBTITLE, C.CON_THUMNAIL, C.CON_YOUTUBE_URL, C.CON_BODY, C.CON_PREFIX, C.CON_IMPORTANCE, C.CON_PRICE, C.CON_USE_YN, C.CON_WRITE_YN, C.PRS_ID, C.CON_META_YN, C.CON_PRIOT, P.PRI_ID, M.MEM_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_CONT_CNT WCC WHERE WCC.CON_ID = C.CON_ID) AS CON_CNT, IF(P.PRI_EXPD IS NULL, 0, IF((DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'))) < 0, 0, DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d')) + 1)) AS CON_EXPD, date_format(C.CON_CREATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_CREATE_DATE, date_format(C.CON_UPDATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_UPDATE_DATE FROM WH_CONTENT C LEFT JOIN WH_PRICE P ON C.CON_ID = P.CON_ID AND P.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') <= P.PRI_EXPD LEFT JOIN WH_MEMBER M ON C.PRS_ID = M.MEM_ID WHERE C.CON_USE_YN = 1 AND CON_TYPE IN ('0', '1', '9') AND (CON_SUBTITLE LIKE '%${keyword}%' OR M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%${keyword}%') union SELECT C.CON_ID, C.CON_TITLE, C.CON_SUBTITLE, C.CON_THUMNAIL, C.CON_YOUTUBE_URL, C.CON_BODY, C.CON_PREFIX, C.CON_IMPORTANCE, C.CON_PRICE, C.CON_USE_YN, C.CON_WRITE_YN, C.PRS_ID, C.CON_META_YN, C.CON_PRIOT, P.PRI_ID, M.MEM_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_CONT_CNT WCC WHERE WCC.CON_ID = C.CON_ID) AS CON_CNT, IF(P.PRI_EXPD IS NULL, 0, IF((DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'))) < 0, 0, DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d')) + 1)) AS CON_EXPD, date_format(C.CON_CREATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_CREATE_DATE, date_format(C.CON_UPDATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_UPDATE_DATE FROM WH_CONTENT C LEFT JOIN WH_PRICE P ON C.CON_ID = P.CON_ID AND P.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') <= P.PRI_EXPD LEFT JOIN WH_MEMBER M ON C.PRS_ID = M.MEM_ID WHERE C.CON_USE_YN = 1 AND CON_TYPE IN ('0', '1', '9') AND (CON_BODY LIKE '%${keyword}%' OR M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%${keyword}%') union SELECT C.CON_ID, C.CON_TITLE, C.CON_SUBTITLE, C.CON_THUMNAIL, C.CON_YOUTUBE_URL, C.CON_BODY, C.CON_PREFIX, C.CON_IMPORTANCE, C.CON_PRICE, C.CON_USE_YN, C.CON_WRITE_YN, C.PRS_ID, C.CON_META_YN, C.CON_PRIOT, P.PRI_ID, M.MEM_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_CONT_CNT WCC WHERE WCC.CON_ID = C.CON_ID) AS CON_CNT, IF(P.PRI_EXPD IS NULL, 0, IF((DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'))) < 0, 0, DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d')) + 1)) AS CON_EXPD, date_format(C.CON_CREATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_CREATE_DATE, date_format(C.CON_UPDATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_UPDATE_DATE FROM WH_CONTENT C LEFT JOIN WH_PRICE P ON C.CON_ID = P.CON_ID AND P.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') <= P.PRI_EXPD LEFT JOIN WH_MEMBER M ON C.PRS_ID = M.MEM_ID WHERE C.CON_USE_YN = 1 AND CON_TYPE IN ('0', '1', '9') AND (CON_PREFIX LIKE '%${keyword}%' OR M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%${keyword}%')) A ORDER BY CON_UPDATE_DATE DESC LIMIT ${offset}, ${limit}

SELECT C.CON_ID, C.CON_TITLE, C.CON_SUBTITLE, C.CON_THUMNAIL, C.CON_YOUTUBE_URL, C.CON_BODY, C.CON_PREFIX, C.CON_IMPORTANCE, C.CON_PRICE, C.CON_USE_YN, C.CON_WRITE_YN, date_format(C.CON_CREATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_CREATE_DATE, date_format(C.CON_UPDATE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %T') CON_UPDATE_DATE FROM WH_CONTENT C WHERE C.CON_USE_YN = 1 AND CON_TYPE = #{CON_TYPE} AND APP_ID = #{APP_ID} ORDER BY CON_UPDATE_DATE DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT IF(P.PRI_EXPD IS NULL, 0, IF((DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'))) < 0, 0, DATEDIFF(P.PRI_EXPD, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d')) + 1)) AS CON_EXPD FROM WH_CONTENT C LEFT JOIN WH_PRICE P ON C.CON_ID = P.CON_ID AND P.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') <= P.PRI_EXPD WHERE C.CON_ID = #{CON_ID}
SELECT IF(MAX(COM_ID) IS NULL, 1, MAX(COM_ID) + 1) AS COM_ID, 'TMP' AS TMP FROM WH_COMMENT WHERE CON_ID = #{CON_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_COMMENT (CON_ID, COM_ID, MEM_ID, COM_BODY) VALUES (#{CON_ID}, #{COM_ID}, #{MEM_ID}, #{COM_BODY})
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_CONTENT SET PRS_ID = IFNULL(#{PRS_ID}, PRS_ID), CON_TITLE = #{CON_TITLE}, CON_SUBTITLE = #{CON_SUBTITLE}, CON_ORIGIN_URL = #{CON_ORIGIN_URL}, CON_YOUTUBE_URL = #{CON_YOUTUBE_URL}, CON_BODY = #{CON_BODY}, CON_PREFIX = #{CON_PREFIX}, CON_PRICE = #{CON_PRICE}, CON_META_YN = #{CON_META_YN}, CON_USE_YN = #{CON_USE_YN}, CON_WRITE_YN = IFNULL(#{CON_WRITE_YN}, CON_WRITE_YN), CON_CATEGORY = #{CON_CATEGORY}, CON_TOP_YN = #{CON_TOP_YN}, CON_TOP_DATE = #{CON_TOP_DATE} WHERE CON_ID = #{CON_ID}
UPDATE WH_CONTENT SET CON_PRICE = 0 WHERE CON_ID = #{CON_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_CONTENT (CON_ID, PRS_ID, APP_ID, CON_TYPE, CON_CATEGORY, CON_TITLE, CON_SUBTITLE, CON_ORIGIN_URL, CON_YOUTUBE_URL, CON_BODY, CON_PREFIX, CON_PRICE, CON_META_YN, CON_USE_YN, CON_WRITE_YN, CON_PRIOT, CON_TOP_YN, CON_TOP_DATE ) VALUES (#{CON_ID}, #{PRS_ID}, #{APP_ID}, #{CON_TYPE}, #{CON_CATEGORY}, #{CON_TITLE}, #{CON_SUBTITLE}, #{CON_ORIGIN_URL}, #{CON_YOUTUBE_URL}, #{CON_BODY}, #{CON_PREFIX}, #{CON_PRICE}, #{CON_META_YN}, #{CON_USE_YN}, #{CON_WRITE_YN}, #{CON_ID}, #{CON_TOP_YN}, #{CON_TOP_DATE} )
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_PRESS SET CATEGORY_TAG = #{CATEGORY_TAG} WHERE APP_ID = #{APP_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CON_ID) + 1 AS CON_ID FROM WH_CONTENT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_CHAGE (MEM_ID, CHG_TYPE, CHG_RECEIPT, CHG_TRAN_ID, CHG_PROD_ID, CHG_STAR) VALUES (#{MEM_ID}, ${CHG_TYPE}, #{receipt}, #{transactionId}, #{productId}, ${STAR})

INSERT INTO WH_CONTENT (CON_ID, PRS_ID, APP_ID, CON_TYPE, CON_CATEGORY, CON_TITLE, CON_BODY, CON_USE_YN, CON_PRIOT) VALUES (#{CON_ID}, #{PRS_ID}, #{APP_ID}, #{CON_TYPE}, #{CON_CATEGORY}, #{CON_TITLE}, #{CON_BODY}, #{CON_USE_YN}, #{CON_ID})
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_CONTENT SET PRS_ID = IFNULL(#{PRS_ID}, PRS_ID), CON_TITLE = IFNULL(#{CON_TITLE}, CON_TITLE), CON_SUBTITLE = IFNULL(#{CON_SUBTITLE}, CON_SUBTITLE), CON_ORIGIN_URL = IFNULL(#{CON_ORIGIN_URL}, CON_ORIGIN_URL), CON_YOUTUBE_URL = IFNULL(#{CON_YOUTUBE_URL}, CON_YOUTUBE_URL), CON_BODY = IFNULL(#{CON_BODY}, CON_BODY), CON_USE_YN = IFNULL(#{CON_USE_YN}, CON_USE_YN) WHERE CON_ID = #{CON_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT IF(SUM(CON_PRICE) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_PRICE)) AS PRICE, IF(SUM(CON_PRICE_CHG) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_PRICE_CHG)) AS PRICE_CHG FROM WH_PRICE WHERE CON_ID = #{conId}
SELECT IF(SUM(CON_HEART) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_HEART)) AS HEART, IF(SUM(CON_HEART_CHG) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_HEART_CHG)) AS HEART_CHG FROM WH_HEART WHERE CON_ID = #{conId}
SELECT CON_ID, CON_PRIOT FROM WH_CONTENT WHERE CON_PRIOT > #{now} AND CON_TYPE = #{CON_TYPE} ORDER BY CON_PRIOT ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT CON_ID, CON_PRIOT FROM WH_CONTENT WHERE CON_PRIOT < #{now} AND CON_TYPE = #{CON_TYPE} ORDER BY CON_PRIOT DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CON_ID, CON_PRIOT FROM WH_CONTENT WHERE CON_PRIOT = #{now}
SELECT EVT_ID, EVT_TEXT, EVT_BTN_TEXT, EVT_STAR, EVT_URL, EVT_CHG_YN FROM WH_EVENT WHERE EVT_USE_YN = 1 ORDER BY EVT_ID DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM WH_EVENT_HST WHERE MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND EVT_ID = #{EVT_ID} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM WH_EVENT WHERE EVT_ID = #{EVT_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_CHAGE_EVT (MEM_ID, EVT_ID, CHG_STAR) VALUES (#{MEM_ID}, #{EVT_ID}, #{STAR})
INSERT INTO WH_WATCH (CON_ID, MEM_ID, WATCH_CNT) VALUES (#{CON_ID},#{MEM_ID},1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE WATCH_CNT=WATCH_CNT+1
mapper.select: SELECT #{MEM_ID} AS MEM_ID, WW.CON_ID, WW.MEM_ID AS VIEWER_ID, M.MEM_NAME AS VIEWER_NAME, M.MEM_PICTURE AS VIEWER_PICTURE, (CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT NULL FROM WH_FOLLOW WF WHERE WF.FOLLOW_ID = WW.MEM_ID AND WF.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) IS_FOLLOWING FROM WH_WATCH WW INNER JOIN WH_MEMBER M ON WW.MEM_ID = M.MEM_ID WHERE CON_ID=#{CON_ID}

SELECT DISTINCT M.MEM_ID AS FOLLOW_ID, #{MEM_ID} AS MEM_ID, M.MEM_NAME AS FOLLOW_NAME, M.MEM_PICTURE AS FOLLOW_PICTURE, (CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT NULL FROM WH_FOLLOW WF WHERE WF.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND WF.FOLLOW_ID = M.MEM_ID) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IS_FOLLOWING FROM WH_CONTENT WH INNER JOIN WH_MEMBER M ON WH.PRS_ID = M.MEM_ID WHERE WH.CON_TYPE=9 AND M.MEM_ID != #{MEM_ID} AND M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%${KEYWORD}%' ORDER BY WH.CON_CREATE_DATE DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_SUBSCRIBE ( MEM_ID, PRS_ID, SUB_TYPE, TRAN_ID, START_DATE, EXPD_DATE, SUB_USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{MEM_ID}, #{PRS_ID}, 'MONTHLY', #{TRAN_ID}, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), 1 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE EXPD_DATE = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), -- 재구독 시 만료일 연장 TRAN_ID = #{TRAN_ID}, SUB_USE_YN = 1, SUB_UPDATE_DATE = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT S.SUB_ID, S.PRS_ID, DATE_FORMAT(S.EXPD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS EXPD_DATE, -- 작가 이름 (언론사 테이블 우선 확인 후 없으면 멤버 테이블) COALESCE(P.PRS_NAME, M.MEM_NAME) AS NAME, -- 프로필 사진 COALESCE(P.STORED_FILE_NM, M.MEM_PICTURE) AS PICTURE, -- 구분 (0: 언론사, 1: 일반유저) CASE WHEN P.PRS_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS IS_NORMAL_USER FROM WH_SUBSCRIBE S LEFT JOIN WH_PRESS P ON S.PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID LEFT JOIN WH_MEMBER M ON S.PRS_ID = M.MEM_ID WHERE S.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND S.EXPD_DATE > NOW() -- 아직 만료되지 않은 것만 AND S.SUB_USE_YN = 1 ORDER BY S.START_DATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_SUBSCRIBE SET EXPD_DATE = #{NEW_EXPD_DATE}, -- 스토어에서 받은 새 만료일 SUB_UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), SUB_USE_YN = 1 WHERE MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID}
